productDisplayName: Nike Men Swift FG Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Enhance your performance during your soccer game with this Firm Ground nike Swift FG shoe. Created using PVC-free synthetic leather and lightweight conical studs, this shoe a great buy. Product Details Soft, flexible PVC-free household synthetic leather upper with central lace-ups and smooth rounded toe region for better ball feel Meshed and padded tongue and inner PU midsole and high density, die-cut reused Avoi sockliner  Lightweight TPU denture with conical studs on the ball of the foot and bladed studs on the heel  Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
